news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer10 Jun ETF (JUNT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. JUNT was launched on May 31, 2023 and is issued by Allianz.

data.title: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Allianz Investment Management LLC (AllianzIM), a subsidiary of Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America and adviser to the AllianzIM exchange-traded funds (ETFs), ...
